query:
SELECT 
  'faturamento_tiss' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN convenio_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_convenio_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN data_referencia IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_data_referencia
FROM faturamento_tiss;
